generated_oml:
# Actuating components
instance SpeedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder ESC converting desired speed commands to motor voltage"
]
instance SteeringActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator driven by ESC/Jetson for yaw"
]
instance EmergencyBrakingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command routed to ESC"
]

# Sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLidarSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR (object detection and range)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]
instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera (visual data)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageData
]
instance EspeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Speed sensor from ESC"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]
instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor from servo encoder"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

# Data transmitted (raw sensor streams)
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLidarSensor
]
instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]
instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EspeedSensor
]
instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]
instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLidarSensor, IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

# Functional models and output data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering on raw LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2ProcessingNode
]
instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman-filter tracking of object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2ProcessingNode
]
instance ACCControllerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO15622 ACC controller model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2ProcessingNode
]
instance VehicleStateVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization rendering of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RvizVisualizationNode
]

instance LiDARClusteringResultData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Result of DBSCAN clustering on raw LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2ProcessingNode
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
]
instance KalmanTrackingData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Kalman-filter tracking of object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2ProcessingNode
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
]
instance ACCControllerStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "ISO15622 ACC controller model state"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2ProcessingNode
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData, ObjectTrackData
]
instance VehicleStateVisualizationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D visualization rendering of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RvizVisualizationNode
    DTDFVocab:fromData ACCControllerStateData
]
instance SQLTimeseriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Persistently stored timeseries data in external SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData, KalmanTrackingData, ACCControllerStateData
]

# Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware (Python 3.8 & C++ nodes) using DDS over Wi‑Fi"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService,
                      ACCRemoteManagementService, DataStorageService,
                      ACCSimulationVisualizationService, ReportGenerationService
]
instance EVJetpack : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK on Jetson Orin Nano"
]
instance MatlabSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for clustering/tracking"
]
instance RoboRacerFrameworkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source RoboRacer framework"
]
instance OpcUaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OPC UA optional for data translation"
]
instance WifiNetwork : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi‑Fi networking for telemetry transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]
instance JetsonOrinNanoDevice : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano hardware"
]
instance CloudServer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Remote cloud server hosting the Digital Twin Entity"
]
instance RvizVisualizationNode : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RViz node for 3D visualization"
]
instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database enabler for persistent storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]
instance ROS2ProcessingNode : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 processing node for data algorithms"
]

# Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data monitoring and real‑time telemetry UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeTelemetryInsight
]
instance ACCComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading for Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputationInsight
]
instance ACCRemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management of ACC (enable/disable, set target speed, emergency brake)"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustACCParametersAction, TriggerEmergencyBrakeAction
]
instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data storage to external SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:provides TimeseriesStorageInsight
]
instance ACCSimulationVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive‑cruise‑control simulation and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCVisualizationInsight
]
instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Report generation (human‑readable timeseries)"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalPerformanceReportInsight
]

# Insights
instance RealTimeTelemetryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time telemetry and historical reports for performance analysis"
]
instance HistoricalPerformanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human‑readable timeseries reports for performance analysis"
]
instance ACCParameterAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of ACC parameters"
]
instance TimeseriesStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation of timeseries data storage in SQL database"
]
instance ACCComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC computation results offloaded to remote server"
]
instance ACCVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of Adaptive Cruise Control simulation"
]

# Actions
instance AdjustACCParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust ACC parameters such as target speed"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance TriggerEmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking via ESC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance ExposeObjectTracksAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Expose processed object tracks for engineering diagnostics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

# Environment
instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLidarSensor, IntelD435iDepthCamera,
                 EspeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor,
                 SpeedActuator, SteeringActuator, EmergencyBrakingActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "DT emits desired‑speed commands, emergency‑brake triggers, enable/disable ACC signals, and steering adjustments; all are sent over Wi‑Fi as ROS 2 DDS messages, received by the Physical Twin Entity and forwarded to ESC/sensors."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All end‑to‑end communication and control loops are bounded by ≤100 ms latency (3GPP 3rd GPP v3.3‑162). Clock synchronization across all components is maintained to within 100 ms accuracy; data rates for LiDAR features nominally 10–20 Hz, with ROS 2 QoS configured for real‑time delivery."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation follows ISO 23247 RA: Physical Twin Entity encapsulates vehicle hardware, Digital Twin Entity executes simulation/ACC logic, User Entity provides dual FE for 3‑D visualization and control panel; inter‑entity communication is handled by the Data Translation cross‑system FE. All entities collaborate over ROS 2 DDS on a single Wi‑Fi broadcast domain."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The twin covers the *operated* stage of the vehicle lifecycle, providing real‑time operational monitoring and remote control; the same platform can also be reused for design validation and post‑manufacturing analysis, but the case study focuses on the operation phase."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity ensured by applying DBSCAN for raw LiDAR clustering and Kalman filtering for track estimation, ISO 15622 compliance for ACC logic, clock sync tolerance of 100 ms, and ROS 2 QoS settings for guaranteed‑delivery of telemetry; uncertainty in perception and actuator command latency is explicitly bounded by the 100 ms requirement."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical and Digital twins are connected over IEEE 802.11 (Wi‑Fi) using ROS 2 DDS for inter‑entity messaging; the Data Translation FE serializes data packets and translates between physics and digital representations; all network traffic is encapsulated in standard ROS 2 middleware messages."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity is hosted on a remote cloud server (public cloud or local data‑center) with high‑performance compute; Physical Twin Entity resides on the vehicle’s NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; the User Entity runs on operator workstations; all layers communicate via Wi‑Fi."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture (Part 2 RA), ISO 15622 ACC specification, ROS 2 middleware (DDS standard), IEEE 802.11 Wi‑Fi network, OPC UA optional for data translation"
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "System operates under strict safety‑critical constraints with 100 ms latency requirement; ACC logic complies with ISO 15622, and control commands are transmitted over ROS 2 DDS, but explicit encryption/authentication mechanisms are not described; safety‑related fail‑safe behavior is implied by adherence to ACC safety standards."
]
